title: Nagqu Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap has hit Nagqu, with a Z-Score of -4.40. This event is rated as CRITICAL with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Nagqu are extremely cold, with a high HDD value of 16.4 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 85%, and the wind speed is moderate at 5.8 km/h. 
 The CDD value is 0.0 GG, indicating no heat stress.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols immediately due to the critical weather situation.
